scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,frontend "npm.cmd --prefix server run dev" "npm.cmd --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.typecheck: npm.cmd --prefix game-core run type-check && npm.cmd --prefix server run type-check && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run type-check
scripts.lint: npm.cmd --prefix backend run lint && npm.cmd --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.test: npm.cmd --prefix game-core run test && npm.cmd --prefix server run test
scripts.install:all: npm.cmd --prefix server install && npm.cmd --prefix frontend install && npm.cmd --prefix game-core install
